name: Crock Pot Roast--Kathy Pitts
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half the onion in the bottom of the roast.
2. Rub the roast with the soup mix.
3. Place the roast in the pot and top with the remaining onion.
4. Cover and cook on low heat for at least 12 hours.
5. Do not add water—let the roast make its own juices.
6. You can add carrots or potatoes to the roast by placing them in the bottom so they absorb the juices.
